customMethods.name: resolveOutScan
submitTrimOut
customMethods.script:
lotId = self.view.custom.activeLotId
	if lotId is None:
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("No LOT", "Scan or select a LOT before recording Trim OUT.", "warning")
		return
	# TrimOut OperationTemplate resolved by code (active version) - no business logic in view.
	operationTemplateId = BlueRidge.Parts.OperationTemplate.getActiveTemplateIdByCode("TrimOut")
	if operationTemplateId is None:
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("Template missing", "No active 'TrimOut' operation template is published.", "error")
		return
	dest = self.view.custom.destValue
	if dest is None or dest == "":
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("No destination", "Scan or pick a Machining destination.", "warning")
		return
	data = {
		"parentLotId": lotId,
		"operationTemplateId": operationTemplateId,
		"shotCount": self.view.custom.shotCount,
		"scrapCount": self.view.custom.scrapCount,
		"destinationCellLocationId": dest,
	}
	res = BlueRidge.Workorder.TrimOut.record(data)
	BlueRidge.Common.Ui.notifyResult(res, "Trim OUT recorded")
	if res.get("Status"):
		system.perspective.navigate("/shop-floor/lot-detail/" + str(lotId))

messageHandlers.script:
self.view.custom.activeLotId = payload.get("lotId")
	# TODO(phase4): record the TrimIn checkpoint via ProductionEvent_Record here.
	# Per spec 6.2 the IN tab should fire ProductionEvent.record (TrimIn template,
	# carried-forward cumulative counters). The cumulative shot/scrap counter inputs
	# are not yet collected on this tab, so the checkpoint call is deferred rather than
	# invented. Wire BlueRidge.Workorder.ProductionEvent.record({lotId, operationTemplateId
	# (TrimIn active version), shotCount, scrapCount, ...}) once those inputs exist.

props.text: Trim is yield loss only - LOT keeps its cast-part identity through Trim OUT.
Currently checked-in here - awaiting close - Resume jumps to OUT for that LOT
Empty when no LOT is currently active at this Cell.

props.toolTipText: Placeholder row - wire BlueRidge.Lots.Lot.getWipQueueByLocation(<cell id>) to populate active LOTs and enable Resume.

props.text: Empty when no LOT is currently active at this Cell.
Pick a LOT - scan or select from storage
Scan disambiguates -> IN if in storage, OUT if active here, Error otherwise
Path B (rapid in/out): scan -> IN form auto-fires -> submit -> OUT form opens for same LOT -> submit. Same gesture, two events, no tab switching.
Auto-arrived from Die Cast OUT - Lot.LocationId = Trim Shop Area (no Cell yet)
Pickable LOTs appear here once the storage-queue read is wired.

props.toolTipText: Placeholder row - populate from the Trim Shop Area storage queue read, then enable Pick -> IN.

props.text: Movement Scan - Receive at Trim Cell
Validates eligibility (v_EffectiveItemLocation) + MaxParts cap on scan-in
Eligibility (Parts.ItemLocation cascade to Cell) and MaxParts cap are validated by MovementScan on scan-in.

props.text: Whole-LOT move - no split at Trim (sub-LOT split moved to Machining OUT - FDS-05-009)
Trim is yield loss - whole-LOT move to Machining. Scan or pick destination, then Trim OUT.

props.text: Records RejectEvent against this LOT - no rename, no new LOT
